metadata.description: MailX email deliverability skills for AI agents — SPF, DKIM, DMARC, BIMI, blacklists, SMTP/IMAP and more.

plugins.name: email-deliverability
plugins.description: Diagnoses and fixes email deliverability issues by checking SPF, DKIM, DMARC, BIMI records, blacklist status, and SMTP/IMAP server connectivity. Generates DNS records for email authentication.
